columns.column_name: Volume of disease - N (%) | High | Treatment
columns.extraction_plan: From Table 1, on page 5, locate the "High Volumea" section. Under the "Darolutamide (n = 497)" column, the number of patients is 497. The total number of patients in the Darolutamide arm is 651 (from Figure 1, page 3, "Analyzed for primary end point"). Calculate the percentage as (497 / 651) * 100.
columns.column_name_raw: Volume of disease - N (%) | High | Treatment

columns.column_name: Volume of disease - N (%) | High | Control
columns.extraction_plan: From Table 1, on page 5, locate the "High Volumea" section. Under the "Placebo (n = 508)" column, the number of patients is 508. The total number of patients in the Placebo arm is 654 (from Figure 1, page 3, "Analyzed for primary end point"). Calculate the percentage as (508 / 654) * 100.
